uncertainties.read: TRANSPOSED 'Areco Schedule B' grid (continuation of p.122-129): each COLUMN is one transaction (10 columns). Header rows give EIF marker (only cols 5-8: BLACKROCK/MCSXX and VANGUARD/VIG), owner (DC/SP), asset name, ticker, Transaction type (P/S(Part)/S), and Transaction Date (bottom row). The left-hand ROW-LABEL column (Amount of Transaction A-L buckets, Type of Transaction, Capital Gain) is off-page on the preceding sheet (p.122). The amount matrix and Capital Gain rows are unlabeled here and degraded (X marks are dark bars), so amount=null and cap_gain_over_200=null for every tx.
uncertainties.note: use the p.122 'Areco Schedule B' A-L bucket/Type/Capital-Gain label key to resolve amounts by row position
